commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9f4c6f2409711e0eec6658df27749003b5f53f01)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the voice-call realtime handler to skip `triggerGreetingOnReady` for OpenAI providers while preserving explicit initial greetings for other realtime providers, and adds focused handler tests.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +126. Total +139 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current `main` routes `initialMessage` into `initialGreetingInstructions`, and the PR disables the only `onReady` path that consumes those instructions for OpenAI. I did not run a live Twilio/OpenAI call in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs a code repair plus contributor-supplied real behavior proof; automation should not mark this mergeable while the external proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix(voice-call): avoid OpenAI realtime double greeting
target.body:
Fixes #85846

## Summary
- Skip the voice-call plugin's explicit `triggerGreeting` on OpenAI realtime telephony sessions when an initial outbound message is present.
- Keep explicit initial greetings enabled for non-OpenAI realtime providers such as Google, where the provider does not auto-create a response from server VAD.
- Add focused realtime handler regressions for both paths.

## Why
OpenAI realtime server VAD defaults to `create_response: true`. For outbound voice calls with an initial message, the telephony handler also queued an explicit greeting via `triggerGreeting()`, so OpenAI could create two back-to-back responses on the first caller turn.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts`

Note: commit is SSH-signed locally and verified with `git log --show-signature -1`. No live Twilio/OpenAI call was run in this environment.
